mapper.sql: user_id, email, password_hash, display_name, status, email_verified_at, last_login_at, password_changed_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.select: select from users where user_id = #{userId} and deleted_at is null
select from users where email = #{email} and deleted_at is null
insert into users (email, password_hash, display_name) values (#{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}) returning
mapper.insert: insert into user_roles (user_id, role_id) select #{userId}, role_id from roles where role_code = 'USER' and is_active = true on conflict do nothing
mapper.select: select 'ROLE_' || r.role_code from user_roles ur join roles r on r.role_id = ur.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and ur.is_active = true and r.is_active = true and (ur.expires_at is null or ur.expires_at > now()) union select p.permission_code from user_roles ur join roles r on r.role_id = ur.role_id join role_permissions rp on rp.role_id = r.role_id join permissions p on p.permission_id = rp.permission_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and ur.is_active = true and r.is_active = true and p.is_active = true and (ur.expires_at is null or ur.expires_at > now())
mapper.update: update users set last_login_at = now() where user_id = #{userId} and deleted_at is null
update users set password_hash = #{passwordHash}, password_changed_at = now() where user_id = #{userId} and deleted_at is null
update users set status = 'WITHDRAWN', deleted_at = now() where user_id = #{userId} and deleted_at is null
